---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Simulate data for Linear quantile regression

heteroscedastic error with increasing variance simulation

OLS

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
# Library section
library(quantreg)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(sn)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
set.seed(479)
sample_size <- c(50, 100, 200, 450, 700)
repli <- 1000
beta0_original <- 20
beta1_original <- 0.6
sigma_error <- 1.9
mean_error <- 0
beta_error <- 1/7
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
set.seed(479)
slope_func <- function(data, indices) {
  d <- data[indices, ]
  fit <- lm(y ~ x, data = d)
  coef(fit)[2]
}
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
# Looping areaaaaaaaa
taus <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9)

ols_qr_heteroscedastic <- list()
for (i in seq_along(sample_size)) {
  results_list <- list()
  n <- sample_size[i]

  for (j in 1:repli) {
    # data set creation
    x <- runif(n, min = 0, max = 5)
    y <- beta0_original + beta1_original * x + rnorm(n, mean_error, sigma_error) * (1 + x * beta_error)
    dat <- data.frame(x = x, y = y)
    
    ols <- lm(y ~ x, data = dat)
    ols_sum <- coeftest(ols)
    slope_ols <- ols_sum[2, 1]
    se_slope_ols    <- ols_sum[2,2]
    pval_ols <- ols_sum[2, 4]
    ci_lower_ols <- slope_ols - 1.96 * se_slope_ols
    ci_upper_ols <- slope_ols + 1.96 * se_slope_ols
    
    
    results_list[[j]] <- tibble(
      Run = j,
      Sample_Size = n,
      Model = "OLS",
      Slope = round(slope_ols, 4),
      Bias = slope_ols - beta1_original,
      SE_Slope = round(se_slope_ols, 4),
      Coverage = (ci_lower_ols <= beta1_original) && (ci_upper_ols >= beta1_original),
      Power = pval_ols < 0.05,
      CI_Lower = round(ci_lower_ols, 4),
      CI_Upper = round(ci_upper_ols, 4),
      True_Slope = beta1_original
    )
    
    for (tau in taus) {
      beta1.true <- beta1_original + qnorm(tau) * sigma_error * beta_error
      
      qr <- rq(y ~ x, tau = tau, data = dat)
      sum_qr <- summary(qr, se = "boot", bsmethod = "xy", R = 200)
      
      slope_qr <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Value"]
      se_slope_qr  <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Std. Error"]
      p_qr <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Pr(>|t|)"] 
      ci_lower_qr <- slope_qr - 1.96 * se_slope_qr
      ci_upper_qr <- slope_qr + 1.96 * se_slope_qr
      
      results_list[[length(results_list) + 1]] <- tibble(
        Run = j,
        Sample_Size = n,
        Model = paste0("QR_", tau),
        Slope = round(slope_qr, 4),
        Bias = slope_qr - beta1.true,
        SE_Slope = round(se_slope_qr, 4),
        Coverage = (ci_lower_qr <= beta1.true) && (ci_upper_qr >= beta1.true),
        Power = p_qr < 0.05,
        CI_Lower = round(ci_lower_qr, 4),
        CI_Upper = round(ci_upper_qr, 4),
        True_Slope = round(beta1.true, 4)
      )
    }
  }
  ols_qr_heteroscedastic[[i]] <- bind_rows(results_list)
}

ols_qr_heteroscedastic <- bind_rows(ols_qr_heteroscedastic)

head(ols_qr_heteroscedastic, n = 6)
```

```{r}
models <- unique(ols_qr_heteroscedastic$Model)

# Create the overall multi-model plot ONCE (outside the loop)
slope_all_heter <- ggplot(ols_qr_heteroscedastic, 
                          aes(x = factor(Sample_Size), y = Slope, fill = Model)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(data = distinct(ols_qr_heteroscedastic, Model, True_Slope),
             aes(yintercept = True_Slope, color = Model), linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Estimated vs True Slopes",
       x = "Sample Size", y = "Estimated Slope") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(slope_all_heter)
saveRDS(slope_all_heter, "slope_all_heter.rds")
```

```{r}
for (mod in models) {
  df_mod <- filter(ols_qr_heteroscedastic, Model == mod)
  
  ci_lower_avg <- mean(df_mod$CI_Lower, na.rm = TRUE)
  ci_upper_avg <- mean(df_mod$CI_Upper, na.rm = TRUE)
  true_slope   <- mean(df_mod$True_Slope)

  if (mod == "OLS") {
    p <- ggplot(df_mod, aes(x = factor(Sample_Size), y = Slope)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.3, fill = "steelblue") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = true_slope, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
      annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               ymin = ci_lower_avg, ymax = ci_upper_avg,
               fill = "blue", alpha = 0.07) +
      annotate("text", x = Inf, y = true_slope + 0.5,
               label = paste("True Slope =", round(true_slope, 3)),
               hjust = 1, vjust = 0, color = "red", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
      labs(title = paste("Slope Estimates -", mod),
           x = "Sample Size", y = "Slope") +
      theme_minimal()
    
  } else {
    p <- ggplot(df_mod, aes(x = factor(Sample_Size), y = Slope)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.3, fill = "steelblue") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = true_slope, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
      annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               ymin = ci_lower_avg, ymax = ci_upper_avg,
               fill = "blue", alpha = 0.07) +
      annotate("text", x = Inf, y = true_slope + 0.5,
               label = paste("True Slope =", round(true_slope, 3)),
               hjust = 1, vjust = 0, color = "red", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
      labs(title = paste("Slope Estimates -", mod),
           x = "Sample Size", y = "Slope") +
      theme_minimal()
  }
  
  print(p)
  saveRDS(p, paste0(mod, "_slope_heter.rds"))
}
```

```{r}
bias_heter <- ggplot(ols_qr_heteroscedastic, aes(x = factor(Sample_Size), y = Bias, fill = Model)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Bias", x = "Sample Size", y = "Bias")
print(bias_heter)
saveRDS(bias_heter, "Bias_all_heter.rds")
```

```{r}
power_coverage_heter <- ols_qr_heteroscedastic %>%
  group_by(Sample_Size, Model) %>%
  summarise(Power_rate = mean(Power) * 100,
    Coverage_rate = mean(Coverage) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )


power_heter <- ggplot(power_coverage_heter, aes(x = Sample_Size, y = Power_rate, color = Model)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 95, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Power Rate", x = "Sample Size", y = "Power percentage") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

cover_heter <- ggplot(power_coverage_heter, aes(x = Sample_Size, y = Coverage_rate, color = Model)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 95, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
           ymin = 95 - 1.96 * sqrt(0.05 * 0.95/repli)*100,
           ymax = 95 + 1.96 * sqrt(0.05 * 0.95/repli)*100,
           alpha = 0.1, fill = "blue") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Coverage Rate", x = "Sample Size", y = "Coverage percentage")

library(patchwork)
power_heter | cover_heter

saveRDS(power_heter, "power_heter.rds")
saveRDS(cover_heter, "cover_heter.rds")
```

Type I error

```{r}
# set.seed(479)
# typeI_results <- list()
# for (skew in skewness) {
#   cat("\nSkewness =", skew, "\n")
#  
#   for (i in seq_along(sample_size)) {
#     n <- sample_size[i]
#    
#     reject_ols <- logical(repli)
#     reject_qr <- logical(repli)
#    
#     for (j in 1:repli) {
#       # Generate error
#       if (skew == 0) {
#         error <- rnorm(n, mean = 0, sd = 3.5)
#       } else {
#         shape <- 4 / skew^2
#         rate <- sqrt(shape) / 3.5
#         error <- rgamma(n, shape = shape, rate = rate)
#         error <- error - mean(error)
#       }
#      
#       x <- runif(n, 0, 5)
#       y <- beta0_original + 0 * x + error # TRUE slope = 0
#      
#       dat <- data.frame(x = x, y = y)
#      
#       # OLS
#       ols_fit <- lm(y ~ x, data = dat)
#       p_ols <- summary(ols_fit)$coefficients["x", "Pr(>|t|)"]
#       reject_ols[j] <- p_ols < 0.05
#      
#       # QR tau=0.5
#       qr_fit <- rq(y ~ x, tau = 0.5, data = dat)
#       sum_qr <- summary(qr_fit, se = "boot", bsmethod = "mcmb")
#       se_qr <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Std. Error"]
#       ci_l <- coef(qr_fit)[2] - 1.96 * se_qr
#       ci_u <- coef(qr_fit)[2] + 1.96 * se_qr
#       reject_qr[j] <- (ci_l > 0) || (ci_u < 0)
#     }
#    
#     # Calculate Type I error rate + 95% CI for OLS
#     p_ols <- mean(reject_ols)
#     se_ols <- sqrt(p_ols * (1 - p_ols) / repli)
#     ci_ols_lower <- p_ols - 1.96 * se_ols
#     ci_ols_upper <- p_ols + 1.96 * se_ols
#    
#     # Calculate Type I error rate + 95% CI for QR
#     p_qr <- mean(reject_qr)
#     se_qr <- sqrt(p_qr * (1 - p_qr) / repli)
#     ci_qr_lower <- p_qr - 1.96 * se_qr
#     ci_qr_upper <- p_qr + 1.96 * se_qr
#    
#     # Store results
#     typeI_results <- append(typeI_results, list(
#       tibble(
#         Sample_Size = n,
#         Skewness = skew,
#         Model = "OLS",
#         TypeI_Error = p_ols,
#         TypeI_Lower = ci_ols_lower,
#         TypeI_Upper = ci_ols_upper,
#         Rejections = sum(reject_ols)
#       )
#     ))
#    
#     typeI_results <- append(typeI_results, list(
#       tibble(
#         Sample_Size = n,
#         Skewness = skew,
#         Model = "QR_tau_0.5",
#         TypeI_Error = p_qr,
#         TypeI_Lower = ci_qr_lower,
#         TypeI_Upper = ci_qr_upper,
#         Rejections = sum(reject_qr)
#       )
#     ))
#   }
# }
# typeI_df <- bind_rows(typeI_results)
# # Display nice table
# typeI_df %>%
#   mutate(across(c(TypeI_Error, TypeI_Lower, TypeI_Upper), ~ round(.x * 100, 2))) %>%
#   select(Skewness, Sample_Size, Model, TypeI_Error, TypeI_Lower, TypeI_Upper, Rejections) %>%
#   arrange(Skewness, Sample_Size, Model)
```

```{r}
# set.seed(479)
# typeI_results <- list()
# 
# for (skew in skewness) {
#   cat("\nSkewness =", skew, "\n")
#  
#   for (i in seq_along(sample_size)) {
#     n <- sample_size[i]
#    
#     reject_ols <- logical(repli)
#     reject_qr  <- logical(repli)
#    
#     for (j in 1:repli) {
#       # Generate error
#       if (skew == 0) {
#         error <- rnorm(n, mean = 0, sd = 3.5)
#       } else {
#         shape <- 4 / skew^2
#         rate  <- sqrt(shape) / 3.5
#         error <- rgamma(n, shape = shape, rate = rate)
#         error <- error - mean(error)
#       }
#      
#       x <- runif(n, 0, 5)
#       y <- beta0_original + 0 * x + error # TRUE slope = 0
#      
#       dat <- data.frame(x = x, y = y)
#      
#       # OLS
#       ols_fit <- lm(y ~ x, data = dat)
#       p_ols <- summary(ols_fit)$coefficients["x", "Pr(>|t|)"]
#       reject_ols[j] <- p_ols < 0.05
#      
#       # QR tau=0.5
#       qr_fit <- rq(y ~ x, tau = 0.5, data = dat)
#       sum_qr <- summary(qr_fit, se = "boot", bsmethod = "mcmb")   # kept as requested
#       se_qr  <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Std. Error"]
#       ci_l   <- coef(qr_fit)[2] - 1.96 * se_qr
#       ci_u   <- coef(qr_fit)[2] + 1.96 * se_qr
#       reject_qr[j] <- (ci_l > 0) || (ci_u < 0)
#     }
#    
#     # Calculate Type I error rate + 95% CI 
#     p_ols <- mean(reject_ols)
#     se_ols <- sqrt(p_ols * (1 - p_ols) / repli)
#     ci_ols_lower <- p_ols - 1.96 * se_ols
#     ci_ols_upper <- p_ols + 1.96 * se_ols
#    
#     p_qr <- mean(reject_qr)
#     se_qr <- sqrt(p_qr * (1 - p_qr) / repli)
#     ci_qr_lower <- p_qr - 1.96 * se_qr
#     ci_qr_upper <- p_qr + 1.96 * se_qr
#    
#     # Store results - now side by side (one row per n & skew)
#     typeI_results <- append(typeI_results, list(
#       tibble(
#         Skewness      = skew,
#         Sample_Size   = n,
#         OLS_TypeI     = p_ols,
#         OLS_Lower     = ci_ols_lower,
#         OLS_Upper     = ci_ols_upper,
#         OLS_Rejections = sum(reject_ols),
#         QR_TypeI      = p_qr,
#         QR_Lower      = ci_qr_lower,
#         QR_Upper      = ci_qr_upper,
#         QR_Rejections = sum(reject_qr)
#       )
#     ))
#   }
# }
# 
# typeI_df <- bind_rows(typeI_results)
# 
# # Display nice table - OLS and QR side by side
# typeI_df %>%
#   select(Skewness, Sample_Size, OLS_TypeI, QR_TypeI) %>%
#   arrange(Skewness, Sample_Size)
#   print(typeI_df)
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
set.seed(479)
typeI_he <- list()

for (i in seq_along(sample_size)) {
  n <- sample_size[i]
  
  reject_ols <- logical(repli)
  reject_qr  <- matrix(FALSE, nrow = repli, ncol = length(taus))
 
  for (j in 1:repli) {
    x <- runif(n, 0, 5)
    y <- beta0_original + 0 * x + rnorm(n, mean_error, sigma_error) * (1 + x * beta_error)
    dat <- data.frame(x = x, y = y)
   
    # OLS
    ols_fit <- lm(y ~ x, data = dat)
    p_ols <- summary(ols_fit)$coefficients["x", "Pr(>|t|)"]
    reject_ols[j] <- p_ols < 0.05
    
    # QR - only record rejections here
    for (k in seq_along(taus)) {
      tau <- taus[k]
      beta1.true <- 0 + qnorm(tau) * sigma_error * beta_error
      qr_fit <- rq(y ~ x, tau = tau, data = dat)
      sum_qr <- summary(qr_fit, se = "boot", bsmethod = "xy", R = 200)
      se_qr <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Std. Error"]
      ci_l  <- coef(qr_fit)[2] - 1.96 * se_qr
      ci_u  <- coef(qr_fit)[2] + 1.96 * se_qr
      
      reject_qr[j, k] <- (ci_l > beta1.true) || (ci_u < beta1.true)
    }
  }
  
  # OLS Summary
  p_ols <- mean(reject_ols)
  se_ols <- sqrt(p_ols * (1 - p_ols) / repli)
  ci_ols_lower <- p_ols - 1.96 * se_ols
  ci_ols_upper <- p_ols + 1.96 * se_ols
  
  typeI_he <- append(typeI_he, list(
    tibble(
      Sample_Size = n,
      Model = "OLS",
      TypeI_Error = p_ols,
      TypeI_Lower = ci_ols_lower,
      TypeI_Upper = ci_ols_upper
    )
  ))
  
  # QR Summary - one per tau
  for (k in seq_along(taus)) {
    tau <- taus[k]
    p_qr <- mean(reject_qr[, k])
    se_qr <- sqrt(p_qr * (1 - p_qr) / repli)
    ci_qr_lower <- p_qr - 1.96 * se_qr
    ci_qr_upper <- p_qr + 1.96 * se_qr
    
    typeI_he <- append(typeI_he, list(
      tibble(
        Sample_Size = n,
        Model = paste0("QR_", tau),
        TypeI_Error = p_qr,
        TypeI_Lower = ci_qr_lower,
        TypeI_Upper = ci_qr_upper
      )
    ))
  }
}

typeI_dfhe <- bind_rows(typeI_he)

# Display nice table
typeI_dfhe %>%
  select(Sample_Size, Model, TypeI_Error, TypeI_Lower, TypeI_Upper) %>%
  arrange(Sample_Size, Model)
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
typei_2models_he <- ggplot(typeI_dfhe, aes(x = factor(Sample_Size), y = TypeI_Error, color = Model)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  # geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = TypeI_Lower, ymax = TypeI_Upper), width = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
           ymin = 0.05 - 1.96 * sqrt(0.05 * 0.95 / repli),
           ymax = 0.05 + 1.96 * sqrt(0.05 * 0.95 / repli),
           alpha = 0.1, fill = "blue") +
  labs(title = "Type I Error Rate",
       x = "Sample Size",
       y = "Type I Error Rate") +
  theme_minimal()

saveRDS(typei_2models_he, "typei_2models_he.rds")
typei_2models_he
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
```
